title: chrysocoma acicularis
intro: Chrysocoma acicularis, also known as the bitterbush or bitter shrub, is a shrubby plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve flatulence, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Chrysocoma acicularis include treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and constipation, as well as respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
